name: orchestrating-long-tasks
description: Four-phase workflow (Discovery, Documentation, Execution, Review) for tasks that span multiple context windows. Uses a docs-as-manual architecture so any agent can resume work from any point without conversation history.

plugins.name: orchestrating-long-tasks
plugins.description: Long-task orchestration skill: structured domain documents (L1 index + L2 domain docs) let agents resume work across context windows. Includes multi-expert review protocol, phase gates, and mid-phase recovery.
